heading: Deposit and retention of credit card refunds or rebates
label: 2235a Deposit and retention of credit card refunds or rebates
text: On and after , refunds or rebates received on an on-going basis from a credit card services provider under the Department of Agriculture’s charge card programs may be deposited to and retained without fiscal year limitation in the Department’s Working Capital Fund established under and used to fund management initiatives of general benefit to the Department of Agriculture bureaus and offices as determined by the Secretary of Agriculture or the Secretary’s designee.November 28, 2001section 2235 of this title
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in the following prior appropriation act:, , , 1549A–43.Pub. L. 106–387, § 1(a) [title I, § 757]114 Stat. 1549Oct. 28, 2000
